CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tax Info required; ----G216:Month end +30days---- ----G007:TT00 ,Paid---- ----G005:OA60 ,Within 60 days Due net---- ----G011:OA75 ,Within 75 days Due net---- ----G006:OA90 ,Within 90 days Due net---- ----0001: Pay immediately w/o deduction---- ----G498: End of month+60 days,Cut off 25th----
CustomField.label: Payment Term
